patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the use of normalName() which converts the tag name to lowercase, making the parsing case-insensitive. To fix this, we should use the original tag name without converting it to lowercase, especially when case sensitivity is enabled.
patches.changes:
- String name = t.asEndTag().normalName();
+ String name = t.asEndTag().name();
patches.diff:
- String name = t.asEndTag().normalName();
+ String name = t.asEndTag().name();
